sql: CREATE TYPE "public"."database_type" AS ENUM('postgres');

CREATE TABLE "chats" (
	"id" uuid PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	"created_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"updated_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"database_id" uuid,
	"title" text
);

CREATE TABLE "chats_messages" (
	"id" uuid PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	"created_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"updated_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"chat_id" uuid NOT NULL,
	"parts" jsonb[] NOT NULL,
	"role" text NOT NULL,
	"metadata" jsonb
);

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
	"id" uuid PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	"created_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"updated_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"type" "database_type" NOT NULL,
	"name" text NOT NULL,
	"connection_string" text NOT NULL,
	"password_exists" boolean NOT NULL,
	"password_populated" boolean NOT NULL
);
ALTER TABLE "chats" ADD CONSTRAINT "chats_database_id_databases_id_fk" FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES "public"."databases"("id") ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE "chats_messages" ADD CONSTRAINT "chats_messages_chat_id_chats_id_fk" FOREIGN KEY ("chat_id") REFERENCES "public"."chats"("id") ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
name: 20250731225032_massive_gwen_stacy

sql:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
	"id" uuid PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	"created_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"updated_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"database_id" uuid NOT NULL,
	"name" text NOT NULL,
	"query" text NOT NULL
);
ALTER TABLE "queries" ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE "queries" ADD CONSTRAINT "queries_database_id_databases_id_fk" FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES "public"."databases"("id") ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;

sql: ALTER TYPE "public"."database_type" RENAME TO "connection_type";
ALTER TABLE "databases" RENAME TO "connections";
ALTER TABLE "chats" RENAME COLUMN "database_id" TO "connection_id";
ALTER TABLE "queries" RENAME COLUMN "database_id" TO "connection_id";
ALTER TABLE "chats" DROP CONSTRAINT "chats_database_id_databases_id_fk";
ALTER TABLE "queries" DROP CONSTRAINT "queries_database_id_databases_id_fk";
ALTER TABLE "chats" ADD CONSTRAINT "chats_connection_id_connections_id_fk" FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES "public"."connections"("id") ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE "queries" ADD CONSTRAINT "queries_connection_id_connections_id_fk" FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES "public"."connections"("id") ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;

CREATE TABLE "connections_resources" (
	"id" uuid PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	"created_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"updated_at" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
	"connection_id" uuid NOT NULL,
	"name" text NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT "connections_resources_connectionId_name_unique" UNIQUE("connection_id","name")
);

ALTER TABLE "connections_resources" ADD CONSTRAINT "connections_resources_connection_id_connections_id_fk" FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES "public"."connections"("id") ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
